should_trigger: Filter these review findings by severity?
Which findings from the review should I fix first?
Present each review finding for me to approve or skip?
Help me prioritize the security issues from my review?
should_not_trigger: Run /phx:review on my code for quality issues (review skill)
What are Ecto query anti-patterns? (ecto-patterns skill)
Fix all the security findings I identified (work skill)
Challenge my implementation for rigor (challenge skill)
Show me LiveView best practices (liveview-patterns skill)
